author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Observation: Only LayerNorm has GPU kernels. BatchNorm, GroupNorm, MaxPool2d, AvgPool2d have zero GPU coverage.

Prioritizing BatchNorm forward since it's used in every CNN training step. The approach: BatchNorm computes per-channel mean and variance, then normalizes. On GPU this is a per-channel parallel reduction + elementwise normalization. Can reuse the reduce_sum_kernel pattern from CL-338.
